title: Luster Legacy
description: This is a legacy version of Luster, 16x PBR pack
body:
↓ My recent project is HERE ! ↓

[LusterResourcePack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/luster16)

Luster aims to express harmony of pixelated beauty and shader's realistic atmosphere, by using optifine features. Exploring with this pack will give you a fresh feel. Also there are lots of blocks that enhance your building.
## Features
- LabPBR format(Reflections, Normal maps, Height maps, Emissions)
- Optifine features support(Custom Texture Models)
- 16x Resolution, similar to vanilla's ambience
- Most blocks are applied textures and some have low res PBR
- Animated textures
- Doubled slabs turn into different texture

## Requirements
This pack needs:
- Optifine or mods (Continuity, Entity Texture Features and Entity Model Features)
- Shaders with labPBR support (BSL shaders is highly recommended)

## Terms
**You can**:
- Upload in-game videos or screenshots on any media. If you can, please put the name of this pack and its download link in the description.
- Modify files **only for personal use**.

**You cannot**:
- Redistribute this pack **regardless of whether files are edited or not**.
- Claim this pack as your own.
- Use my work for commercial purposes.
- Upload a work that include the assets of this pack.


The only official page is here, modrinth. Please note that any other source may not be safe. 
Thank you, have fun!
